title: Glass Salt and Pepper Containers with Glass Lid, Multipurpose Tomato, Avocado, Onion, Lemon Keeper/Saver/Container/Storage, Citrus Mini Containers for Fridge (1 PCS)
features: Made of high quality premium glass to keep contents from absorbing odours from the refrigerator. Extends the shelf life of cut lemons and limes.
Perfect design that is great to store your lemon, avocado, onion, tomato, berry, fruit, butter, cheese, citrus in the fridge or to serve on the table.
Tempered Glass, Dishwasher safe, Microwave safe, Refrigerator safe.
It's made of quality, food-safe European Nonlead Glass. Unlike some plastic keeper, it's 100% BPA free.
Height: 12cm / 4.7", Diameter: 8cm / 3'' Clear Glass Cover and Clear Plate High Quality.Made in Türkiye
